docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCANNLON, COLLIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SAHI, PARVESH AS TO DEFENDANT SCANNLON, COLLIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAHI, PARVESH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCANNLON, COLLIN THE ALLEGATIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND THE TESTIMONY RECEIVED, WHILE TROUBLING TO THE COURT WERE NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AWARD OF DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
